# FTW Arms Custom Weapons Tutorial Search

Source: User request plus handbook research.
Provided by: H3VR Modding Contributor and Codex research
Captured: 2026-07-10
Redistribution: link index only.

## Result

No direct, independently verifiable URL for a tutorial titled FTW Arms Custom
Weapons was found during the handbook research.

The maintained H3VR Modding Wiki links its recommended custom-weapon tutorial
from its Making Mods page. Use that route as the current baseline and replace
this card with a direct FTW Arms source if one is supplied.

- H3VR Modding Wiki custom-object route:
  https://h3vr-modding.github.io/wiki/creating/making_mods.html
- Related FTW Arms example package:
  https://thunderstore.io/c/h3vr/p/Andrew_FTW/FTW_Arms_Modular_M1a/
